name: scaffold
description: Scaffolding, validation, and editing for Claude Code agents, skills, and MCP servers. Ships /new-agent, /new-skill, /new-mcp (generators); /audit-agent, /audit-skill, /audit-mcp (validators); /edit-agent, /edit-skill, /edit-mcp (focused edits with audit-bracketed regression checks). Backed by canonical best-practice references.
